title: Pilots and controllers reported supersonic UFOs near Bragança Paulista-SP [1986]
excerpt: MAY 27th, 1986. Time: 23:36. Duration: not determined. text_preview: MAY 27th, 1986. Time: 23:36. Duration: not determined. An aircraft pilot flying from São Paulo-SP to Varginha-MG, the TF 402, having taken off at 22:07, reported having seen a “bright light, in its 9-hour position” about 33NM from the city of Bragança Paulista-SP. At that same time, according to a report, the “ACC-BS [Brasília-DF] was capturing a primary “plot” with a speed of 813 kt [1,540 km / h] and a course of 208 degrees in that position”. Another aircraft, the flight “VARIG RG256A [SBGR / SBCF – São Paulo-Guarulhos Airport to Belo Horizonte-Confins Airport – FL330, DEP 23:18]” reported s
summary: On May 27, 1986, pilots near Bragança Paulista SP reported bright lights; radar tracked a primary plot at 813 kt; VARIG flight requested diversion.
